case_title: BETTY BARNES VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BARNES, BETTY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00- SERVED APR-14-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

"THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE HER CLAIM WITHIN SIX MONTHS FOLLOWING THE DENIAL OF HER GOVERNMENT CLAIM PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.6", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY--CCSF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
